Write a one-sentence headline for this story: 'A team of marine biologists discovered a new species of deep-sea jellyfish off the coast of New Zealand that produces a bioluminescent display lasting up to 10 minutes — the longest ever recorded in any jellyfish species.'

Write a one-sentence headline for this story: 'The city of Amsterdam announced it will ban all gasoline and diesel cars from its city center by 2030, making it the first European capital to set such an aggressive timeline for zero-emission urban transit.'

Write a one-sentence headline for this story: 'A 12-year-old student in Ohio built a functional nuclear fusion reactor in her garage using publicly available instructions and second-hand parts, becoming the youngest person to achieve a sustained fusion reaction outside of a professional lab.'

Write a one-sentence headline for this story: 'After 15 years of research, scientists at CERN have confirmed the existence of a previously theoretical subatomic particle, filling the last gap in the Standard Model of particle physics.'

Write a one-sentence headline for this story: 'Global average ocean temperatures hit an all-time record high for the third consecutive month, prompting scientists to warn that climate models have underestimated the pace of ocean warming.'

Solve this math word problem and show your reasoning: 'A project requires 8 workers to complete in 15 days. How many days would it take 12 workers to complete the same project, assuming constant productivity?'
Solve this math word problem and show your reasoning: 'You invest $5,000 at an annual interest rate of 6% compounded annually. How much will you have after 5 years?'
